'''gowagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:libelluloid|libelluloid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:libelluloid|libelluloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gowagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowagithi|gowagithi]] || [[word:gowagiji|gowagiji]] || [[word:gowagishi|gowagishi]] || [[word:gowagiki|gowagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowaguthuthu|gowaguthuthu]] || [[word:gowagujuju|gowagujuju]] || [[word:gowagushushu|gowagushushu]] || [[word:gowagukuku|gowagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowaguthu|gowaguthu]] || [[word:gowaguju|gowaguju]] || [[word:gowagushu|gowagushu]] || [[word:gowaguku|gowaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowagufthuf|gowagufthuf]] || [[word:gowagufjuf|gowagufjuf]] || [[word:gowagufshuf|gowagufshuf]] || [[word:gowagufkuf|gowagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowagethe|gowagethe]] || [[word:gowageje|gowageje]] || [[word:gowageshe|gowageshe]] || [[word:gowageke|gowageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowagothotho|gowagothotho]] || [[word:gowagojojo|gowagojojo]] || [[word:gowagoshosho|gowagoshosho]] || [[word:gowagokoko|gowagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowagotho|gowagotho]] || [[word:gowagojo|gowagojo]] || [[word:gowagosho|gowagosho]] || [[word:gowagoko|gowagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowagofthof|gowagofthof]] || [[word:gowagofjof|gowagofjof]] || [[word:gowagofshof|gowagofshof]] || [[word:gowagofkof|gowagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfthĂŻf|gowagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfjĂŻf|gowagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfshĂŻf|gowagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfkĂŻf|gowagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|gowagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|gowagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|gowagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|gowagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfthĂŻf|gowagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfjĂŻf|gowagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfshĂŻf|gowagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfkĂŻf|gowagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfthĂŻf|gowagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfjĂŻf|gowagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfshĂŻf|gowagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gowagĂŻfkĂŻf|gowagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gowagĂŠthĂŠ|gowagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gowagĂŠjĂŠ|gowagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gowagĂŠshĂŠ|gowagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gowagĂŠkĂŠ|gowagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gowagathatha|gowagathatha]] || [[word:gowagajaja|gowagajaja]] || [[word:gowagashasha|gowagashasha]] || [[word:gowagakaka|gowagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gowagatha|gowagatha]] || [[word:gowagaja|gowagaja]] || [[word:gowagasha|gowagasha]] || [[word:gowagaka|gowagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gowagafthaf|gowagafthaf]] || [[word:gowagafjaf|gowagafjaf]] || [[word:gowagafshaf|gowagafshaf]] || [[word:gowagafkaf|gowagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gowagasha|gowagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowagshĂ«sha|gowagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowagrosha|gowagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowagmusha|gowagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowagyasha|gowagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowagnkshĂ«sha|gogowagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowagnkrosha|gogowagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowagnkmusha|gogowagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowagnkyasha|gogowagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gowawagasha|gowawagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowawagshĂ«sha|gowawagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowawagrosha|gowawagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowawagmusha|gowawagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowawagyasha|gowawagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowawagnkshĂ«sha|gogowawagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowawagnkrosha|gogowawagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowawagnkmusha|gogowawagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowawagnkyasha|gogowawagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gewĂŠgasha|gewĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gewĂŠgshĂ«sha|gewĂŠgshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gewĂŠgrosha|gewĂŠgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gewĂŠgmusha|gewĂŠgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gewĂŠgyasha|gewĂŠgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogewĂŠgnkshĂ«sha|gogewĂŠgnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogewĂŠgnkrosha|gogewĂŠgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogewĂŠgnkmusha|gogewĂŠgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogewĂŠgnkyasha|gogewĂŠgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gowfagasha|gowfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gowfagshĂ«sha|gowfagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowfagrosha|gowfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowfagmusha|gowfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowfagyasha|gowfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogowfagnkshĂ«sha|gogowfagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogowfagnkrosha|gogowfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogowfagnkmusha|gogowfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogowfagnkyasha|gogowfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
